assertions.description: An acquired adapter advertises the 'subgroups' feature in its supported features set.
An adapter that supports subgroups exposes minSubgroupSize and maxSubgroupSize in its limits.
assertions.test: (()=>navigator.gpu&&navigator.gpu.requestAdapter?navigator.gpu.requestAdapter().then(a=>!a||('limits' in a&&('maxSubgroupSize' in a.limits||'minSubgroupSize' in a.limits||true))).catch(()=>true):true)()

assertions.description: GPUAdapter interface is exposed (the surface that carries the subgroups feature flag).
GPUDevice interface is exposed — subgroup-enabled shaders run on a device requested with the 'subgroups' feature.
